summary: Classified the 20 job candidates from the hydrated preflight artifact. The original representative #57379 is now closed; #58890 is the best hydrated open canonical for the original macOS auto-update/restart-handoff family. No close/comment/label mutation is safe in this pass: 8 candidates are already closed, and the 11 other open reports have distinct remaining work rather than true duplicate coverage. No security-sensitive refs were detected.
